title: Vite + TS scaffold & GitHub Pages deploy
tagline: Node 22 toolchain, Vite base path, Actions-based Pages — replace legacy branch deploy.
risk: Medium — wrong base path 404s all assets on production only; Pages source switch is one-way until verified
headline: Repo is pure static files on legacy Pages (main root). No Node, no build, no CI. Node 20 is not a current bug — it is a trap to avoid when scaffolding (EOL April 2026). Target Node 22, base: '/wordle-league/', and Actions → dist.

decisions.q: UI layer for the eventual port (scaffold should match)
decisions.help: Both audits recommend vanilla TS for this surface area (~800 LOC). Preact is the light alternative if you want components without React weight.

options.label: React (heavier; only if you want the ecosystem)

decisions.q: When to flip Pages source from branch → Actions
decisions.help: Legacy branch deploy serves root files today. After Actions is green on a preview artifact check, flip repo Settings → Pages → GitHub Actions.

options.label: Flip as soon as scaffold build deploys a shell page (recommended)
Keep branch deploy until plan 03 UI parity is done (dual-maintain longer)

decisions.help: No lockfile exists yet. Pick one and commit the lockfile in this plan.
